# Stack facts

<Callout type="warning">
  **Generated file. Do not edit by hand.** Every value below is pulled live
  from a named constant in the codebase by `scripts/generate-stack-facts.mjs`.
  Re-run `npm run generate:stack-facts` after changing a stack constant; the
  script fails loudly if a constant is renamed or moved, which is the whole
  point: these are the facts other architecture pages must agree with.
</Callout>

Last generated: **2026-06-11** (from workspace code constants).

## AI models

| Fact | Value | Source | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Conversation model (Jodie voice agent default) | `claude-sonnet-4-5` | `mind-measure-core/src/services/InstitutionalAgentService.ts` | ElevenLabs agent LLM; default for newly created institutional agents |
| Check-in text analysis model (70% weight) | `anthropic.claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219-v1:0` | `mind-measure-mobile-final/api/bedrock/analyze-text.ts` | AWS Bedrock, called from the mobile app during a check-in |
| Back-office text model | `eu.anthropic.claude-haiku-4-5-20251001-v1:0` | `mind-measure-core/api/_lib/bedrock-models.ts` | AI insights, weekly reflections, cohort insight, report narratives, SEO |
| Back-office text model label (DB metadata) | `claude-haiku-4-5` | `mind-measure-core/api/_lib/bedrock-models.ts` | short label written to cost_tracking / provenance rows |
| Bedrock region | `eu-west-2` | `mind-measure-core/api/_lib/bedrock-models.ts` |  |

## Database

| Fact | Value | Source | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| TLS verification opt-in flag | `DB_SSL_VERIFY` | `mindmeasure-api-lib/src/db-config.ts` | set to 1 per project to enable rejectUnauthorized:true; DB_SSL_INSECURE=1 is the escape hatch |
| Bundled RDS certificate authority | `eu-west-2` | `mindmeasure-api-lib/src/rds-ca.ts` | Amazon RDS regional root bundle inlined for serverless TLS verification |
